name: Deafness — Gravity Manipulation
cost: Permanently lose the sense of Hearing.

abilities.name: Manipulate Gravity
abilities.desc: Manipulate gravity in any of the basic ways granted by the Surge of Gravitation (not talent-granted uses, e.g. Windrunner talents).

name: Blindness — Telepathy
cost: Permanently lose the sense of Sight.

abilities.name: Psychic Relay
abilities.desc: Mentally communicate instantly with any Connected individual; they may reply but cannot initiate without consent. One exchange is a free action; >2 back-and-forth counts as a single action.

abilities.name: Detect Thoughts
abilities.desc: Sense all sentient creatures within 60 ft (location only). Spend an extra action each turn to track them in real time; broken concentration (0 focus or a failed Cognitive-defense test) drops the connection.

abilities.name: Read Thoughts
abilities.desc: d20 + Intellect vs the target's Cognitive defense. Success: extract one piece of info but they're alerted. Crit: same, undetected. Failure: nothing, detected. Crit fail: nothing, and they learn something about you.

name: Chronic Pain — Hot / Cold Manipulation
cost: You are chronically in agony. Reduce your Cognitive and Spiritual defenses by 4 each, and permanently lose all your focus points (maximum Focus 0).

abilities.name: Heat Object
abilities.desc: Heat an object/person up to 200°F for one turn. Range/AOE by actions: 1A touch, 2A 30 ft line, 3A 30 ft cone. At max temp, creatures take 3d6 + your Constitution modifier Thermal damage; reverts to room temp after one turn.

abilities.name: Cool Object
abilities.desc: Cool an object/person down to -50°F for one turn (1A touch / 2A 30 ft line / 3A 30 ft cone). At min temp, creatures take 2d6 + Constitution Thermal damage and are Slowed for one turn.

name: Frailty — Investiture Farming
cost: Permanently gain the Frail condition: immediately make an injury roll on acquiring this status, and each time you recover from an injury you immediately gain (and roll for) a new one.

abilities.name: Farm Investiture
abilities.desc: Infuse a person or suitable receptacle (empty spheres, an unkeyed nicrosilmind) with Investiture up to its maximum. You need a way to convert this to unkeyed Investiture for another to use it.

abilities.name: Invested Entity
abilities.desc: You have limitless access to raw Investiture to fuel any other Invested arts you have (e.g. Surgebinding).

name: Depression — Transformation
cost: Permanently gain the Depressed condition. Once per day roll a d4 for an effect lasting the whole day (replaces the prior day's): 1 Exhausted [-3]; 2 Stunned; 3 Disoriented; 4 no effect.

abilities.name: Transform object/person
abilities.desc: 2A to transform an object as with the Surge of Transformation (Soulcasting), or 3A to soulcast a living target as in the Living Soulcasting talent.

name: Psychosis — Intelligence
cost: Using Brilliance triggers the Psychosis table (roll d4): alongside the correct answer/solution you also receive nonsensical, untrue, or harmful ones — for Deduction/Lore/Recall you get 1d4-1 false answers; for Crafting a 1-2 re-rolls and 3-4 fails for 1d8/Tier self damage; for Medicine a 1-2 succeeds and 3-4 fails for 1d8/Tier damage to the target.

abilities.name: Brilliance
abilities.desc: When you fail a Deduction, Lore, Recall Knowledge, Medicine, or Crafting check, invoke this to instead succeed — you decide what counts as a failure on a continuum. Activating deems your roll a failure (you can't go back to partial info) and triggers the Psychosis table above.

name: Fatigue / Inattention — Fortune Farming
cost: Permanently gain the Unfocused condition (always at least Unfocused [1]). Using these abilities raises your Unfocused level; a long rest lowers it by 1 (min 1). Additive: [1] focus-cost actions cost +1; [2] -1 maximum Focus; [3] non-focus actions (besides movement/Skills) cost 1 FP.

abilities.name: Right Place, Right Time
abilities.desc: Once per long rest, learn of a location or person you'd benefit from visiting and a rough time to do so — nothing else. Does not increase Unfocused.

abilities.name: Soldier of Fortune
abilities.desc: Anticipate an enemy's next action: if you Dodge this turn the attacker auto-fails (1 focus, as usual); if you attack, it auto-hits. After your turn, +1 Unfocused.

abilities.name: Future Sight
abilities.desc: Once per day, receive (4 − your Exhaustion level) visions of the mid/long-term future of yourself or a party member; only one is guaranteed true (and may be vague). Cannot pre-empt Soldier of Fortune. +1 Exhaustion after use.

name: Borderline Personality — Emotional Manipulation
cost: Establishing Emotional Connections risks Emotional Feedback: roll d20 minus the number of Connections made; if it meets or exceeds your Spiritual Defense you fail and are overcome by foreign emotions (GM-determined erratic behavior) until the social fallout resolves or 24 hours pass.

abilities.name: Emotional Connection
abilities.desc: Connect with creatures in a 30 ft radius. 1A: sense one creature's most prominent emotion(s) (up to 3, strongest first). 2A: affect any number of creatures in range. Connections augment a following Soothe/Intensify roll (+1 per Connection).

abilities.name: Soothe / Intensify Emotions
abilities.desc: Soothe or intensify existing emotions of any Connected creatures in 30 ft (uniform choice). d20 + Emotional Connection points vs a GM DC (avg 10, max 20); focus points add +1 each (declared first, not refunded on failure). Cannot create wholly new emotions.

name: Hypercoagulable State — Physical Strength
cost: Permanently gain the Hypercoagulable condition: once per long rest AND once per turn in combat, roll a d20; on a natural 1 you suffer a life-threatening clot — become Unconscious until healed or 1 hour, and take a Permanent Injury from the disease's own table (stroke, arterial thrombosis, MI, or PE).

abilities.name: Unnatural Strength
abilities.desc: Your Strength and Heavy Weaponry permanently increase to +9.

abilities.name: Unnatural Shove
abilities.desc: When you Shove, you can shove the target up to 15 ft through the air, rendering them Prone.

abilities.name: Unnatural Grapple
abilities.desc: When a Grappled foe (or their ally) tries to Shove free, add half your Strength modifier to your Physical Defense vs their roll. You can maintain a Grapple one-handed and make one-handed attacks/reactive strikes without ending it.

name: Coagulopathy — Speed
cost: Permanently gain the Coagulopathic condition: whenever you take Impact or Keen damage you become Afflicted [1d4 Vital], escalating one die size per episode (1d4→1d6→1d8…). A Medicine check stops the bleeding (removes Afflicted) but restores no health; Invested healing stops bleeding and heals.

abilities.name: Unnatural Speed
abilities.desc: Your Speed permanently becomes 9. Gain a 4th action and a 2nd reaction per turn. Foes who trigger your Reactive Strike must roll a natural 20 to succeed (still spending focus).

abilities.name: Unnatural Dodge
abilities.desc: When you Dodge and the attacker still succeeds, you take half damage.

abilities.name: Unnatural Reactive Strike
abilities.desc: Your Reactive Strike range is 10 ft instead of 5 ft.

abilities.name: Dextrous Grapple
abilities.desc: Your Grapple range is 10 ft (with an implement to tie/trip), and you use your Speed modifier instead of Athletics to Grapple.

name: Recurrent Syncope — Telekinesis
cost: Permanently gain the Syncopal condition: certain triggers (sight of blood, temperature extremes, large crowds, once per combat, once per Telekinesis use) force a d8 — on a 1 you pass out (Unconscious, 6 seconds), on a 2 you may spend a focus point to stay conscious. Passing out mid-action can cause fall/dangerous-action consequences.

abilities.name: Base Telekinesis
abilities.desc: Move a person/object (incl. yourself) within 60 ft with your mind, like Gravitation, with two exceptions: you must see the object to initiate, and beyond 30 ft without line of sight costs 1 focus per further 30 ft. Max TK speed equals your movement; the object can't be heavier than you.

abilities.name: Throw Object
abilities.desc: Launch a Medium-or-smaller object at a foe: 1d8 damage, +1 per 20 lbs.

abilities.name: Enhanced Shot
abilities.desc: Enhance a ranged attack: +1d8 per tier + Willpower to damage. May curve the projectile (attack at disadvantage if the endpoint is obscured). Adds to the attack's action cost.

abilities.name: Enhanced Swing
abilities.desc: Speed up a melee swing for you or an ally: +1d8 per tier + Willpower to the damage.

abilities.name: TK Grapple
abilities.desc: Grapple a foe within 60 ft (3A to sustain). Escaping is their Strength + d20 vs your Willpower + d20.

abilities.name: TK Disarm
abilities.desc: Attempt to disarm a foe (resisted by Cognitive defense).

abilities.name: TK Shove
abilities.desc: Shove a foe (range 60 ft) up to 10 ft, or break a Grapple.

name: Daytime Somnolence and Insomnia — Physical Constitution
cost: You are permanently Exhausted [-3] and have -10 ft movement speed (min 5 ft). Whenever you rest, roll a d4 — on a 1-2 you cannot rest and gain none of its recovery.

abilities.name: Unnatural Constitution
abilities.desc: Your maximum health increases by 1d10 × your level (roll once). You are immune to other sources of Exhausted, plus Afflicted, Disoriented, Slowed, and Stunned. When you choose to regain consciousness after dropping, you recover 1d10 health instead of 1.

name: Asthma — Physical Healing
cost: Permanently gain the Asthmatic condition: you are permanently Slowed, but may use Bronchodilation to remove it for one turn.

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.desc: Heal a willing creature you touch 1d6 (2d6 at L3, 3d6 at L8, 4d6 at L13, 5d6 at L18). Restores health, not injuries.

abilities.name: Heal Injury
abilities.desc: Heal any injury in a creature you touch. Once per long rest.

abilities.name: Heal Ailment
abilities.desc: Heal any condition in a creature you touch. If caused by a 'permanent' Invested Disease, it's removed only for one round.

abilities.name: Bronchodilation
abilities.desc: Touch a willing creature: if Asthmatic, remove Slowed this turn; otherwise grant +5 ft movement.

abilities.name: Cerebral Perfusion
abilities.desc: Touch a willing creature: they regain one focus point.

abilities.name: Inotropy
abilities.desc: Touch a willing creature: +2 Strength and Speed for the rest of their turn.

name: Mutism — Intent Ascertainment / Concealment
cost: You are permanently mute and cannot communicate verbally.

abilities.name: Ascertain Intent
abilities.desc: You have advantage on all Insight checks.

abilities.name: Conceal Intent
abilities.desc: Choose a willing creature within 30 ft: Insight checks against them are made at disadvantage for 1 hour.

name: Amnesia — Manipulate Identity
cost: Each time you use an identity-manipulating ability, roll a d6 — on a 1 you suffer global amnesia and identity contamination: you forget who you are and take on someone else's persona for 4 hours, then regain your Identity.

abilities.name: Suppress Object Identity
abilities.desc: Suppress an object's Identity within 30 ft: Soulcasting/Transformation skills on it gain advantage for 1 hour.

abilities.name: Suppress Personal Identity
abilities.desc: Suppress a creature's Identity within 30 ft: they can use Investiture sources their Identity would normally block, but gain disadvantage vs Identity-altering arts (Living Soulcasting, Soul Forgery).

abilities.name: Unkey Investiture
abilities.desc: Once per day, unkey up to 20 points of Investiture so anyone can use it.

abilities.name: Unkey Invested Art
abilities.desc: Once per day, unkey an item tied to an Invested Art (e.g. a metalmind).

abilities.name: Identity Lock
abilities.desc: Once per long rest, permanently lock an object's use to your Identity (except those under Suppress Personal Identity or similar).

name: Zombification — Connection Farming (Hivemind)
cost: You gain Connection with every creature infected with this disease (Fiends) and join the Hivemind, losing individual thought unless you suppress your Connection (e.g. filling a Duralumin mind). A suppressed Connection still lets you manipulate other Fiends through the hive.

abilities.name: Fiend Physiology
abilities.desc: Permanently gain +2 Speed and +2 Strength, +15 ft movement, and the ability to jump up to half your movement (1A). You take no fall damage from falls up to 100 ft.

abilities.name: Hivemind Coordination
abilities.desc: When accompanied by one or more Fiends in combat: attacking a creature within 5 ft of another Fiend gives you advantage.

abilities.name: Hivemind Coordination — Defense
abilities.desc: When attacked while another Fiend is within 5 ft of your attacker, take the Dodge action to impose disadvantage without spending Focus.

abilities.name: Infectious Bite
abilities.desc: Bite a creature in melee (unarmed attack): 1d6 on a hit. If it is Unconscious or below 3 HP, it gains Zombie Incubation; if not healed within 72 hours it becomes a Fiend.
